zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie Lecomte於1630年出生在法國德 艾斯特沃斯格斯拉-素-普萊時，她的父親Demange Lecomte32歲，母親Eve Colin27歲。她於大約1663年與Jacques Nicolas Charton在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾希米可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1683年3月24日在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾洛斯享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie Lecomte于1630年出生在法国德 艾斯特沃斯格斯拉-素-普萊时，她的父亲Demange Lecomte32岁，母亲Eve Colin27岁。她于大约1663年与Jacques Nicolas Charton在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾希米可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1683年3月24日在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾洛斯享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lecomte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Monique, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Dominique, Francois, Germain, Gilles, Gregoire, Huguette, Pierre.

French and Walloon: nickname for someone in the service of a count or for someone who behaved pretentiously, from Old French conte, cunte ‘count’, with fused masculine definite article le. Compare Comte 1.
History: This surname is listed (in the form Le Comte) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Leconte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Andre, Fritz, Herve, Jean Louis, Pierre, Raoul, Raynald, Rommel, Wesner, Yves.
French: variant of   Lecomte   ‘the count’ (see   Comte   1). This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare   Conte   3 and   Laconte  .

History: This surname is listed (in the form Le Conte) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Lecompte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andrus, Emile, Adelard, Armand, Elrick, Julien, Laurent, Leonce, Marcel, Monique, Normand.
French: variant of   Lecomte   ‘the count’. Compare   Lacount   and   Lecount  .

History: This surname is listed (in the form Le Compte) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Comte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jean Jacques.

nickname for someone in the service of a count or for someone who behaved pretentiously, from Old French conte, cunte ‘count’. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the French cognate Lecomte . Compare Conte 3.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

historicEvents.title: The Palace of Versailles
historicEvents.description: The Palace of Versailles was originally known as a hunting log and retreat for Louis XII. When Louis XIV took over he moved his family into it. After he died the palace was abandoned. It has since been turned into a museum.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie Lecomte was born in 1630, in Raon-sur-Plaine, Vosges, Grand Est, France, her father, Demange Lecomte, was 32 and her mother, Eve Colin, was 27. She married Jacques Nicolas Charton about 1663, in Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 24 March 1683, in Russ, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie Lecomte est née en 1630, à Raon-sur-Plaine, Vosges, Grand Est, France, son père, Demange Lecomte, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Eve Colin, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Jacques Nicolas Charton environ 1663, à Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 24 mars 1683, à Russ, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie Lecomte 1630 in Raon-sur-Plaine, Vosges, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Demange Lecomte 32 und ihre Mutter Eve Colin 27. Sie hat um 1663 in Schirmeck, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich Jacques Nicolas Charton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 24. März 1683 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Russ, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie Lecomte è nata il nel 1630 nel Raon-sur-Plaine, Vosges, Grand Est, Francia, sua padre, Demange Lecomte, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Eve Colin, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Jacques Nicolas Charton circa 1663, nel Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 marzo 1683, nel Russ, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie Lecomteが1630年にフランスグランド エストボスジェズラオン-スル-プレアインで生まれた時，父Demange Lecomteは32歳，母Eve Colinは27歳であった。約1663年にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンスチルメックでJacques Nicolas Chartonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1683年3月24日にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンルスで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie Lecomte(이)가 1630년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 보스그스 라-수-플레이인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Demange Lecomte(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eve Colin(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1663년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 시c크에서 Jacques Nicolas Charton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1683년 3월 24일 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 러스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie Lecomte nasceu em 1630, em Raon-sur-Plaine, Vosges, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Demange Lecomte, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Eve Colin, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Jacques Nicolas Charton aproximadamente 1663, em Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 24 de março de 1683, em Russ, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie Lecomte родилась в 1630 г. в местности раон-сур-плеин, фосгесь, гранд эст, Франция, её отцу по имени Demange Lecomte было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Eve Colin, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jacques Nicolas Charton около 1663 г. в местности щирмекк, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 24 марта 1683 г. в местности расс, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie Lecomte nació en 1630, en Raon-sur-Plaine, Vosges, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Demange Lecomte, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Eve Colin, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Jacques Nicolas Charton aproximadamente 1663, en Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de marzo de 1683, en Russ, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, a la edad de 53 años.
